title: Alubarna Still Burns
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on alubarna still burns, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Alubarna Still Burns. Luffy survives his first loss to Crocodile and begins the long road back into the fight for Alabasta. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: We don't have time to complain. Keep going, guys!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: W-w-wait! Isn't there at least a boat? How far away's the other side anyways!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Around 50km.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: You think I can swim that far!?

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Aghhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: It's a Sandra RareCat Fish!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: It's extremely rare to see!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Save the living planet narration for later!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: And it loves to eat humans!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: and mention that first!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Army soldier
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kung-fu buggongs!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: "We can't abandon our fellow disciples," is what they said.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're not exactly Luffy's disciples though...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: KUOO!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: KUO!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Kuoo!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: KUO!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: In any case, I'm glad we're saved!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Thanks to the help of Alabasta's numerous animals,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The crew managed to cross the river.

dialogue.speaker: Royal Army soldier
dialogue.text: 3 Hours

dialogue.speaker: Royal Army soldier
dialogue.text: Thanks!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We've made pretty good time so far but can we still make it in time?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It'll be hard, even with eyebrows here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No kidding, since he can only carry 2 people at a time! And we have to deal with Baroque Works agents from hereon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Isn't there some way we can all get there as a group!?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Wait, look over there!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: W-What is it!? Did the enemies already track us down!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: No! Those are...!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Carue!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: It's the super spot- billed duck squad!

summary: This part develops alubarna still burns and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
